Site-Specific Safety Plan (SSSP)

Urban Tree Services

Ready
1 Job Details
🧗 Aerial Rescue Plan — Required for all climbing above 3m
2 Permissions & Notifications

Check all permissions/notifications obtained before works commence.

3 First Aid
Call 111 — Emergency
NZ Emergency Services — Police, Fire, Ambulance
4 Hazard Identification & Risk Assessment
Likelihood ↓ / Consequence → Insignificant
(1)		 Minor
(2)		 Moderate
(3)		 Major
(4)		 Catastrophic
(5)
LOW (1–4)— Routine procedures
MEDIUM (5–12)— Specific monitoring
HIGH (13–19)— Senior management attention
CRITICAL (20–25)— Works must stop
5 PPE Confirmation

Check all PPE items required for this job:

6 Job Instructions & Evacuation
7 Crew Members & Acknowledgement

All crew must sign to confirm they have read and understood this risk assessment.

8 Crew Leader Declaration & Signature
